finding_results.notes: Removed the unstable Chapter 1-only surnames and anchored those minor residents by room or relationship reference instead, which prevents this chapter from seeding contradictory canon. The allowed inputs did not provide the bookwide permanent replacement names, so I did not invent unsupported names under the isolation constraint.
Rewrote the Lola-smile and late-night-traffic sentences to direct description and retained only the stronger Harry med-error instance.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 1 now aligns Carmen's car with the later Civic continuity, trims the repeated 'the kind of' sentence frame down to one purposeful use, and strips unsupported minor-character names so the opening no longer introduces locally contradictory side-character canon.
